data.title: Circle introduces USDC Bridge for seamless cross-chain stablecoin transfers, with $500M daily USDC transfers.
data.description: Circle's Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol has been expanded with the addition of the USDC Bridge. This platform handles a significant volume of USDC transfers daily, averaging more than $500 million in value.
argenx presents new data at AAN 2026 showing wider use of VYVGART for MG and CIDP treatment. #NeuromuscularLeadership

data.title: NAVEE Debuts U.S. E-Bike Portfolio at Sea Otter Classic, Accelerating Global Growth
data.description: NAVEE has reached a significant point in its global expansion strategy with its entrance into the U.S. market at the Sea Otter Classic event in Monterey, California on April 17, 2026. The renowned global smart mobility brand has made its official debut in the U.S. e-bike market, signifying a growing focus on capturing the American consumer base. This move highlights NAVEE’s commitment to establishing a presence in North America, showcasing its dedication to offering cutting-edge smart mobility solutions to a wider audience.

data.title: Trump Goes After Reed Hastings Amid Netflix Stock Rout— 'Forced' To Leave?
data.description: President Donald Trump's recent social media post brought attention back to Reed Hastings as Netflix Inc's (NASDAQ: NFLX) stock plummeted and the company confirmed his departure from the board. Trump's post on Truth Social raised questions about whether Hastings was involuntarily removed from the board, injecting a political element into a significant week for the streaming giant. Following a promising first-quarter report, Netflix's shares experienced a notable decline of 9.7% to $97.31 on Friday, the sharpest single-day drop in nearly six months. This decrease came after a less optimistic outlook for the second quarter overshadowed the positive performance. The setback wiped out a portion of the recent stock gains. Notably, Netflix had abandoned its proposed deal with Warner Bros. Discovery.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market At Highs, But Is Hormuz Open? Tesla Earnings Due
data.description: The recent market rally on Friday continued the Nasdaq's impressive streak, which is said to be one of the best in decades. There is also speculation about the current status of the Strait of Hormuz. Investors are eagerly awaiting Tesla's upcoming earnings report. This comes as Dow Jones Futures are at elevated levels.

data.title: B2Gold Reports Fire-Related Incident to the Crushing Circuit at the Goose Mine
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, B2Gold Corp. disclosed that a fire broke out at the Goose Mine's crushing circuit on April 16, 2026. Prompt response actions by on-site emergency responders led to the successful extinguishing of the fire without any reported injuries or need for medical treatment. The mining operations have resumed as scheduled following the incident. B2Gold has been in communication with the pertinent regulatory authorities regarding the event. B2Gold Corp. is listed on the TSX as BTO, NYSE American as BTG, and NSX as B2G.

data.title: President Donald Trump to Read Scripture During America Reads the Bible; Issues Historic Message About the Bible's "Enduring Guidance"
data.description: The president participated in a weeklong Bible event celebrating America's 250th anniversary, which was livestreamed on Great American Pure Flix. Nearly 500 leaders, including the president, joined in. The event was based on 2 Chronicles 7:11–22. On April 17, 2026, President Donald J. Trump released a Presidential Message acknowledging the event.

data.title: New Cashtags feature by X generates $1B trading volume in 2 days, used by Canada's Wealthsimple; not yet in US.
data.description: The Cashtags feature of company X has been incorporated into the online brokerage Wealthsimple, which is based in Canada. However, as of now, no US trading platform has adopted this feature.

data.title: Nexstar's merger with Tegna frozen by federal court due to antitrust concerns. Deal on hold as lawsuit progresses.
data.description: The judge ruled against the merger of the two television companies while an antitrust lawsuit is ongoing. Nexstar stated that their merger agreement had already been finalized.

data.title: Extreme Networks Investigation Continued: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Continues to Investigate the Officers and Directors of Extreme Networks, Inc. - EXTR
data.description: On April 17, 2026, in New York and New Orleans, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., the former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF), disclosed an ongoing probe by KSF into Extreme Networks, Inc. (NasdaqGS: EXTR). This investigation, initiated on January 1, involves scrutinizing specific events related to the company.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Mountain Valley MD Announces Appointment of Advisors and Stock Option Grants
data.description: In Toronto, Mountain Valley MD Holdings Inc. (MVMD) has announced the appointment of advisors and stock option grants. The company (CSE: MVMD) (OTC: MVMDF) issued an updated release to rectify errors in the biographical information of some advisors. This comes after multiple revisions to the original announcement.

data.title: 2026 NAB Show Opens Tomorrow, Uniting Global Media Leaders to Shape the Future of Storytelling
data.description: A prominent event, the 2026 NAB Show, launches on April 18 in Washington. The event will showcase innovations in media, entertainment, and technology, with the exhibits opening on April 19. This event serves as a platform to explore groundbreaking developments in these industries.

data.title: Nexstar Media Group, Inc., Statement on Preliminary Injunction
data.description: Nexstar Media Group, headquartered in Irving, Texas, has issued a statement regarding a preliminary injunction related to their acquisition of TEGNA Inc. The injunction, which has been issued, involves the process of the acquisition transaction. Nexstar Media Group, a media corporation, has been in the process of acquiring TEGNA Inc, another media company. The statement comes in response to the legal action taken in connection with this acquisition. The specific details of the preliminary injunction and the implications on the acquisition deal are yet to be fully disclosed. This development reflects a significant moment in the ongoing business activities of both companies, as the acquisition deal's progress is now affected by the legal actions. More information is expected to be revealed as the situation unfolds.

data.title: xAI's Grok Speech APIs debut 60% cheaper than rivals. Grok offers Speech to Text and Text to Speech services at $0.10/hour, with industry-leading accuracy.
data.description: xAI, owned by Elon Musk, has introduced Grok Speech to Text and Text to Speech APIs for $0.10 per hour. These APIs boast the lowest error rates among enterprise transcription benchmarks.

data.title: NVIDIA Dynamo sees AI upgrade, boasting 97% cache hit rates & 4x lower latency for enterprises.
data.description: NVIDIA has announced significant enhancements to Dynamo, focusing on AI programming agents. These updates result in impressive numbers, including up to a 97% KV cache hit rate and a 4-fold decrease in latency for enterprise installations.

data.title: Worldcoin drops 13% as iris scan tech expands to Zoom, Docusign to combat deepfake threat from rising AI content.
data.description: The majority of integrations are focused on combatting deepfakes as the surge in AI-generated material makes it more challenging to differentiate between humans and AI, with a significant increase in deepfake incidents reported recently.

data.title: Orthofix Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of Orthofix Medical, Inc. - OFIX
data.description: On April 17, 2026, in New York and New Orleans, a former Attorney General of Louisiana, Charles C. Foti, Jr., now a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC ("KSF"), revealed the initiation of an investigation into Orthofix Medical, Inc. This probe by KSF focuses on examining Orthofix's operations and is aimed at assessing any potential wrongdoing. Charles C. Foti Jr. and his team at KSF will delve into the financial health and conduct of Orthofix to determine if there have been any breaches that warrant attention. This scrutiny comes amidst increasing interest in the company's activities, with key figures and data under review.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market At Highs, Hormuz Is Open Or Shut; Tesla Earnings Due
data.description: The recent market rally on Friday continued the Nasdaq's impressive streak, marking one of the best performances in decades. Concerns linger over the status of the Strait of Hormuz, with implications for global trade. Investors are also eagerly anticipating Tesla's upcoming earnings report. This news comes amidst Dow Jones Futures hitting new highs, indicating positive market sentiment.

data.title: Antengene Presents Three Novel Programs at AACR 2026, Highlighting Next-Generation ADC and AnTenGager® TCEs
data.description: On April 17, 2026, in Shanghai and Hong Kong, Antengene Corporation Limited, identified as Antengene (SEHK: 6996.HK), an innovative global biotech company, announced its commitment to discovering, developing, and commercializing groundbreaking medicines. Antengene focuses on introducing first-in-class and/or best-in-class medications to the market, establishing itself as a prominent player in the industry.

data.title: Banistmo Announces Expiration and Results of its Consent Solicitation relating to its 4.250% Senior Notes due 2027
data.description: In Panama City on April 17, 2026, Banistmo, S.A. disclosed the culmination and outcomes of the consent solicitation (CUSIP Nos. 06034L AB6 / P15383 CD5) concerning its 4.250% Senior Notes expiring in 2027.
